long_term.summary: 30-day outlook shows significant institutional hedging via deep ITM puts across tech leaders. Stagflation fears and potential rate cut reversal create challenging macro backdrop
long_term.key_driver: Massive institutional put buying in MSFT/QQQ/AAPL signals defensive positioning for extended correction

news_impact: Iran conflict dominating headlines with Hormuz shutdown risks and G7 emergency oil reserve discussions. Stagflation concerns rising as oil shock meets weakening jobs data. Tech sentiment mixed despite individual stock gains
options_flow_impact: Extremely bearish institutional flow with $8.7M+ in deep ITM put buying across MSFT, QQQ, AAPL. While labeled as potential synthetic longs, the concentrated timing and ladder structures suggest genuine hedging ahead of volatility event
risks: Oil price spike triggers broader inflation concerns forcing Fed hawkishness
Hormuz Strait disruption causes energy crisis and market panic
Tech mega-cap rotation accelerates as MSFT weakness spreads
